ideas.title: Add a pre-ship `trunk build --release` compile gate to the self-improve loop
ideas.why: CI success_rate is 0.77 with 4 recent failures, and the 2026-07-11 red pipeline was a malformed html! skip-link that passed the deploy gate but broke the WASM compile in CI — a local build would have caught it before push.

ideas.title: MOONSHOT: ⌘K command palette + client-side full-text search over all posts
ideas.why: a growing archive (posts.json, 200+ commits/wk) has zero discovery surface — a tinysearch/fst WASM index behind ⌘K, like Vercel's and Linear's docs, turns the site into a place people navigate instead of scroll.

ideas.title: Route self-improve & idea-engine Opus calls to the idle Spark GB10 nodes
ideas.why: router shows spark_today=3 vs cloud_hard=194 while both GB10 GPUs sit at util=0 / ~10W — we are paying cloud for work two local accelerators could absorb.

ideas.title: MOONSHOT: Live in-browser 'factory terminal' that talks to the brain
ideas.why: the factory tab shows static vitals while brain_state.json streams 3344 facts and hallucination % every 15 min — a playable terminal (type `status`, `facts`, `router`) reading these JSON feeds is the one memorable, shareable interaction the site lacks.

ideas.title: MOONSHOT: WebGL force-directed knowledge graph of posts ↔ topics
ideas.why: 214 commits/7d have produced no map of the archive — a canvas/WebGL graph you can orbit and click, borrowing Obsidian's graph view, is both the 'whoa' first impression and a real content-discovery engine.

ideas.title: Emit per-post JSON-LD Article + Open Graph/Twitter card meta
ideas.why: posts.json/sitemap.xml exist but the 214-commits/7d content stream ships with bare social previews and no structured data — rich cards are how Stripe's and Cloudflare's blogs earn shares and SERP real estate.
